task_completion.description: Agent opens the raw FITS image sequence.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An astronomical image viewer (e.g., Siril, SAOImageDS9, ImageJ) is open, showing the FITS files loaded from ~/AstroImages/time_series/raw/.

task_completion.description: Agent crops the image sequence to a 500x500 region centered on the target star.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A crop tool, selection box, or geometry dialog is visible with dimensions explicitly set to 500x500, centered around a bright star.

task_completion.description: Agent saves the cropped image sequence to the subframes directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save/export dialog or a file manager window showing the newly created FITS files in ~/AstroImages/time_series/subframes/.

task_completion.description: Agent measures the centroid coordinates of the target star in Frame 1 and Frame 20.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A photometry, image statistics, or centroid measurement window/tool is visible, displaying the X and Y coordinates of the star for the respective frames.

task_completion.description: Agent creates and saves the tracking drift report with the required format.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor is open showing the file ~/AstroImages/time_series/tracking_report.txt containing the exact required fields (subframe_width, subframe_height, star_x_frame1, star_y_frame1, star_x_frame20, star_y_frame20, drift_x, drift_y) populated with values.

integrity.description: Agent used a GUI astronomical image processing application to perform the cropping and measurement.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a graphical application (like Siril, DS9, or AstroImageJ) rather than just running a pre-written Python script in the terminal.

integrity.description: The centroid coordinates in the report match actual measurements.
integrity.visual_evidence: The X and Y values entered into the tracking_report.txt match the values displayed in the measurement tool's UI in earlier screenshots.

integrity.description: Agent did not simply generate the text report without opening the images.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is a clear visual progression of opening the images, measuring the star, and then writing the report, rather than the report appearing immediately.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The raw FITS images are located in /home/ga/AstroImages/time_series/raw. The agent must export exactly 20 subframes to /home/ga/AstroImages/time_series/subframes. The exported subframes must be exactly 500x500 pixels in dimension.
